ami.description: The ID of the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) used to launch the instance.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the instance.

associate_public_ip_address.description: Indicates whether the instance has a public IP address.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the instance is located.

credit_specification.description: The credit option for CPU usage of the instance.

disable_api_stop.description: If true, the instance cannot be stopped through the API.

disable_api_termination.description: If true, the instance cannot be terminated through the API.

ebs_block_device.description: Block devices attached to the instance, including EBS volumes.

ebs_optimized.description: Indicates whether the instance is optimized for EBS I/O.

enclave_options.description: Options for enabling or disabling Nitro enclaves on the instance.

ephemeral_block_device.description: Ephemeral (instance store) volumes attached to the instance.

host_id.description: The ID of the dedicated host if applicable.

host_resource_group_arn.description: The ARN of the resource group for the dedicated host.

iam_instance_profile.description: The IAM instance profile associated with the instance.

instance_state.description: The current state of the instance.

ipv6_addresses.description: IPv6 addresses assigned to the instance.

key_name.description: The key name of the key pair used for SSH access to the instance.

launch_time.description: The time when the instance was launched.

maintenance_options.description: Options for automatic recovery of the instance.

metadata_options.description: Options for configuring the instance metadata service.

monitoring.description: Indicates whether monitoring is enabled for the instance.

network_interface_id.description: The ID of the network interface attached to the instance.

outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the Outpost if the instance is launched on an Outpost.

password_data.description: Encrypted password data for the instance.

placement_group.description: The placement group in which the instance is launched.

placement_partition_number.description: The partition number of the placement group.

private_dns.description: The private DNS name assigned to the instance.

private_ip.description: The private IP address assigned to the instance.

public_dns.description: The public DNS name assigned to the instance.

public_ip.description: The public IP address assigned to the instance.

root_block_device.description: The root block device of the instance.

secondary_private_ips.description: Secondary private IP addresses assigned to the instance.

security_groups.description: Security groups associated with the instance.

source_dest_check.description: Indicates whether source/destination checks are enabled.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which the instance is running.

tags.description: Key-value pairs assigned to the instance.

tenancy.description: The tenancy of the instance (e.g., default, dedicated, host).

user_data.description: The user data script provided at instance launch.

user_data_base64.description: The Base64-encoded version of the user data.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the VPC security groups associated with the instance.
